headline: Shares of companies within the broader tech sector are trading higher amid overall market gain and easing energy costs after a ceasefire consensus was reached between the U.S. and Iran. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted overall sentiment in the sector.
summary: Shares of companies within the broader tech sector are trading higher amid overall market gain and easing energy costs after a ceasefire consensus was reached between the U.S. and Iran. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted overall sentiment in the sector.
